title: UQQU Electric Foot File, Electric Callus Removers for Feet, Rechargeable Electric Foot Callus Remover Pedicure Kits, Removes Dry Skin for Smoother Feet, Foot Care for Dead Skin - White
features: ELECTRIC PEDICURE TOOL: Our UQQU rechargeable electric foot file easily removes calluses, cracked dry skin, and rough areas instantly and painlessly.
ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The ergonomic shape of this pedicure tool lets you use it at any angle, easily smoothing your heels, toes, sides and balls of your feet.

2 SPEEDS AND 2 HEADS: UQQU electric foot file comes with two roller heads: one for smoothing (coarse) and one for polishing (fine) so you can adjust the treatment to your feet's unique needs. The two speed settings allow you to customise your treatment even further.
BUILT-IN LED LIGHT: The built-in LED light helps with precision and means you'll never miss a spot while using this fantastic pedicure tool. Say goodbye to unsightly and painful foot issues.

EASY TO USE: our UQQU foot files for hard skin electric make callus removal easy, giving you beautifully smooth feet in minutes. Achieve salon-quality results at home with our electric foot file hard skin remover, perfect for maintaining soft and healthy feet all year round.
description: Product description UQQU Electric Foot File, Electric Callus Removers for Feet, Rechargeable Electric Foot Callus Remover Pedicure Kits, Removes Dry Skin for Smoother Feet, Foot Care for Dead Skin Ideal Gift - White Directions 1. Charge the device before first use and whenever the battery is low. 2. Start with the smoothing head (coarse) for callus removal, then switch to the polishing head (fine) for smoothing. 3. Apply a small amount of water or foot cream to the area before use for easier removal of dead skin. 4. Use the lowest speed setting for sensitive areas and higher speed for tougher calluses. 5. Hold the device at an angle suitable for the area you're treating, using the built-in LED light for precision. 6. Gently move the device in circular motions, avoiding deep pressure to prevent injury. 7. Clean the device after each use with warm water and mild soap, then dry thoroughly. 8. Store in a dry place away from heat and direct sunlight. 9. Do not use on broken skin or wounds. Always test on a small area first if you have sensitive skin.
